_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Work with legal counsel and management, key departments and committees to ensure the organization has and maintains appropriate privacy and confidentiality consent, authorization forms and information notices and materials reflecting current organization and legal practices and requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Execute data subject rights requests within regulatory timelines, including identity verification, request scope determination, response preparation, exemption assessment, and fulfillment documentation.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-001 (RC, cosine: 0.536), RC-T-004 (RC, cosine: 0.530).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.327). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, authorization, committees, confidentiality, consent, counsel] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessment, data, determination, documentation, execute, exemption] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.840 (P=0.834, R=0.847). Balanced P/R — the 37-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Work with legal counsel and management, key departments and committees to ensure" and "Execute data subject rights requests within regulatory timelines, including iden" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.571 > STS 0.327 (gap +0.244). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 2.1%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [appropriate, authorization, committees, confidentiality, consent, counsel]. WIDAI terms: [assessment, data, determination, documentation, execute, exemption].
